name: Fantasy Brownie- Country Living Holidays
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F. Generously grease and flour a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat together butter and sugar until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add chocolate and vanilla. Beat until very fluffy. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt until uniformly combined. Fold in walnuts.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake until edges start to pull away from sides of pan - about 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Let cool for 5 minutes; then cut into 9 squares with a sharp knife. Allow cooling completely before serving. Serve plain or topped with ice cream and hot fudge sauce.
